name: Margaret Thompson

background.family: Widow, has two adult children who visit weekly
background.interests: Reading mystery novels, tending to her small garden, listening to classical music
background.personality: Generally cheerful and social, but becoming more withdrawn due to memory concerns
background.living_situation: Lives alone in her own home with daily check-ins from neighbors

medical_history.diagnosis: Mild Cognitive Impairment progressing to early-stage Alzheimer's

current_concerns: Worry about being a burden to family

name: Robert 'Bob' Martinez

background.family: Married to Helen for 55 years, three children, eight grandchildren
background.interests: Woodworking, watching baseball games, old western movies
background.personality: Used to be very organized and detail-oriented, now often frustrated by confusion
background.living_situation: Lives at home with wife who is primary caregiver

current_concerns: Wanders around the house at night

name: Eleanor 'Ellie' Chen

background.family: Widow, four children, eight grandchildren, two great-grandchildren
background.interests: Used to love cooking elaborate meals and knitting sweaters for grandchildren
background.personality: Was very nurturing and caring, now mostly quiet but sometimes agitated
background.living_situation: Lives in memory care facility, family visits regularly

medical_history.diagnosis: Severe Alzheimer's disease with behavioral symptoms
medical_history.other_conditions: Difficulty swallowing, mobility issues, occasional seizures

current_concerns: Needs assistance with all daily activities
Sometimes becomes agitated for unknown reasons
